properties.name: ebro_delta
properties.description: Ebro Delta — sediment-starved delta with active retreat in the southern hemidelta (Punta de la Banya) and accretion in the northern (Punta del Fangar).

properties.name: maresme
properties.description: Maresme coast — Mongat to Blanes, north of Barcelona; chronic-deficit pocket beaches with the railway line at the back of the beach.
